name: extend_kandinsky
creator: vnap0v
description: The Kandinsky library has functions to directly draw to the screen but it does not contain a function to draw a line between any two points or a function to draw circles. This script defines function connect() which draws a line between two given points and function circle() to draw circles. It uses kandinsky.set_pixel(). The script also contains a test of that function drawing several lines of different color. Tested on the calculator using software version 23.2.6.
